title: The Battle for Syrup Village Escalates
description: On pages 7–10, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Also, before everything happens, we need to think calmly and decide what we have to do now...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Just now, I saw Clahador walk out the door...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: if... What usopp said was true...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Then, he must have gone to the shore to join his comrades.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Not only our lives, but the lives of the villagers are also in danger.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: clahador's plan is to obtain this house and the wealth,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: So we should just give it all to him!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: That way we'll get to keep our lives!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Okay!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: unfor- sunsetely... the only one that can stop clahador now...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: ...Is you!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Can you do it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Even though you don't really have to...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I know!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I understand. I wont run away!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'm going to go talk to Clahador right now!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Eh? That Butler went to the shore?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Hey NinJin! Wake up!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: But normally I'm sleeping this time of day...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Now isn't the time to sleep. Something awful might be about to happen

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I think pirates are really coming to attack the village!

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: I think Captain was lying when he said that it was just a lie...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I think so too!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Me too! Because he was acting kinda weird yesterday!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Eh!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Rq...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huff...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It's Kaya- San...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What's she doing walking out...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Something must've happened!

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
